name: United Royale Holdings Corp.
summary: United Royale Holdings Corp. intends to offer planting and cultivation services for Aquilaria Subintegra and Aquilaria Sinensis trees to land owners in Malaysia. It also intends to offer services relating to the extraction of Agarwood from Aquilaria Subintegra and Aquilaria Sinensis trees through inoculation process. The company was formerly known as Bosy Holdings Corp. and changed its name to United Royale Holdings Corp. in February 2017. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
